Further in the background, towards the middle-right, Robert Oppenheimer, an elderly man wearing an áo hoodie Champion, stands behind and slightly to the right of the woman, attentively looking at her; photorealistic subjects, sharp focus on characters, natural lighting.

entities.description: Ilya Sutskever is the main subject in the foreground, a young boy dressed in an orange t-shirt.
Gregor Mendel is positioned in the middle-center, a middle-aged woman wearing a deep violet blouse, a delicate necklace, and a silver ring on her left hand.

Robert Oppenheimer is further in the background, towards the middle-right, an elderly man wearing an áo hoodie Champion, standing behind and slightly to the right of the woman, looking at her attentively.
